mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_base (question, answer, tags, source, usage_count, status, quality_score) VALUES (#{question}, #{answer}, #{tags}, #{source}, #{usageCount}, #{status}, #{qualityScore})

INSERT INTO knowledge_base (question, answer, tags, source, usage_count, status, quality_score) VALUES
(#{item.question}, #{item.answer}, #{item.tags}, #{item.source}, #{item.usageCount}, #{item.status}, #{item.qualityScore})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM knowledge_base WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY quality_score DESC, usage_count DESC

SELECT * FROM knowledge_base WHERE status = 1 AND (question LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR answer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY quality_score DESC, usage_count DESC
SELECT * FROM knowledge_base WHERE status = 1 AND FIND_IN_SET(#{tags}, tags) > 0 ORDER BY usage_count DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_base SET usage_count = usage_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM knowledge_base WHERE status = 1 AND (question = #{question} OR question LIKE CONCAT('%', #{question}, '%') OR #{question} LIKE CONCAT('%', question, '%')) LIMIT 1
